metadata.author: Sana Asif Ahmad
metadata.description: DEVELOPED-ECONOMY COMPARATORS — an optional overlay to benchmark the Global South dataset against high-income jurisdictions. NOT part of the core Global South tracker; lives on a feature branch. Same schema as countries.json.
metadata.scope_note: These are high-income comparators (OECD members). Including them changes the framing from 'Global South tracker' to 'global comparison', which is why they are isolated here.
data_sources: EU AI Act and national AI laws/strategies
metadata.schema_note: Upgraded to the v3.1 schema: evidence-coded in-force implementation, fact-derived UNESCO/OECD, and Governance Maturity. Mirrors data/countries.json so the two can be compared on one global gradient.

ai_strategy.strategy_name: EU AI Act (directly applicable) + national AI Strategy
ai_strategy.lead_agency: Federal Ministry for Economic Affairs / BNetzA

eu_ai_act.notes: EU AI Act is directly applicable law

source.primary_instrument: EU AI Act (Reg. 2024/1689); German AI Strategy

unesco_ai_ethics.notes: Adopted the 2021 UNESCO Recommendation on the Ethics of AI; RAM not typically undertaken by high-income states.

source.primary_instrument: EU AI Act (Reg. 2024/1689); German AI Strategy

oecd_ai_principles.notes: OECD member and adherent to the OECD AI Principles; GPAI founding member.

source.primary_instrument: EU AI Act (Reg. 2024/1689); German AI Strategy

has_enforcement_body.evidence: EU AI Act in force; prohibited-practice enforcement and GPAI transparency apply and a market-surveillance authority is designated. High-risk obligations (conformity/impact/audit/redress) apply from Aug 2026.

has_regulatory_sandbox.evidence: EU AI Act in force; prohibited-practice enforcement and GPAI transparency apply and a market-surveillance authority is designated. High-risk obligations (conformity/impact/audit/redress) apply from Aug 2026.

has_audit_mechanisms.evidence: EU AI Act in force; prohibited-practice enforcement and GPAI transparency apply and a market-surveillance authority is designated. High-risk obligations (conformity/impact/audit/redress) apply from Aug 2026.

has_redress_mechanisms.evidence: EU AI Act in force; prohibited-practice enforcement and GPAI transparency apply and a market-surveillance authority is designated. High-risk obligations (conformity/impact/audit/redress) apply from Aug 2026.

German AI Strategy
World Bank, Individuals using the Internet (% of population), indicator IT.NET.USER.ZS

maturity.basis: EU AI Act in force and phasing in (prohibited practices + GPAI now; high-risk from Aug 2026).

coverage.basis: EU AI Act (in force): prohibited practices, high-risk regime, human oversight; GDPR Art. 22 + EU anti-discrimination law.
coverage.note: Substantive risk/rights coverage in written policy/law. Single-coder; contestable per item.

foundations.basis: Enabling conditions per the World Bank's 'Global Trends in AI Governance' (2024): infrastructure (internet), data governance (DP law), human capital (AI talent), and local innovation ecosystem.
foundations.note: Weighted: 35% infrastructure · 20% data governance · 20% human capital · 25% ecosystem.

has_enforcement_body.evidence: AIDA (Bill C-27) died on the Order Paper at prorogation (Jan 2025) and was not re-tabled; Canada relies on a voluntary code of conduct + PIPEDA — no binding AI law in force or in progress.

has_regulatory_sandbox.evidence: AIDA (Bill C-27) died on the Order Paper at prorogation (Jan 2025) and was not re-tabled; Canada relies on a voluntary code of conduct + PIPEDA — no binding AI law in force or in progress.

has_impact_assessments.evidence: AIDA (Bill C-27) died on the Order Paper at prorogation (Jan 2025) and was not re-tabled; Canada relies on a voluntary code of conduct + PIPEDA — no binding AI law in force or in progress.

has_transparency_requirements.evidence: AIDA (Bill C-27) died on the Order Paper at prorogation (Jan 2025) and was not re-tabled; Canada relies on a voluntary code of conduct + PIPEDA — no binding AI law in force or in progress.

has_audit_mechanisms.evidence: AIDA (Bill C-27) died on the Order Paper at prorogation (Jan 2025) and was not re-tabled; Canada relies on a voluntary code of conduct + PIPEDA — no binding AI law in force or in progress.

has_redress_mechanisms.evidence: AIDA (Bill C-27) died on the Order Paper at prorogation (Jan 2025) and was not re-tabled; Canada relies on a voluntary code of conduct + PIPEDA — no binding AI law in force or in progress.
